requirement_topic.en: Authorized Importer / Dealer Registration and TRA Label Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 授权进口商/经销商注册及TRA标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權進口商/經銷商註冊及TRA標籤要求

summary.en: Only TRA-registered authorized importers or dealers may import and sell type-approved wireless equipment in the UAE. The TRA approval number and TRA ITSEC mark must both appear visibly on the device label and on the product packaging. UAE Free Zones (such as Jebel Ali Free Zone, JAFZA) facilitate re-export and storage without UAE customs duty but do NOT exempt products from TRA type approval requirements for local UAE sale. Products entering the UAE domestic market from a free zone are subject to the same TRA type approval, labelling, and authorized-importer obligations as direct imports. Unauthorized importation or sale of unapproved wireless equipment is an offence under UAE telecommunications law.
summary.zh: 只有TRA注册的授权进口商或经销商方可在阿联酋进口和销售经型号认证的无线设备。TRA审批号和TRA ITSEC标志均须清晰显示于设备标签及产品包装上。阿联酋自由区（如杰贝尔阿里自由区JAFZA）便于转口贸易和存储且无需缴纳阿联酋关税，但不豁免产品在阿联酋本地销售的TRA型号认证要求。从自由区进入阿联酋本地市场的产品与直接进口产品适用相同的TRA型号认证、标签及授权进口商义务。未经授权进口或销售未经认证的无线设备属违反阿联酋电信法律的违规行为。
summary.zht: 只有TRA註冊的授權進口商或經銷商方可在阿聯酋進口和銷售經型號認證的無線設備。TRA審批號和TRA ITSEC標誌均須清晰顯示於設備標籤及產品包裝上。阿聯酋自由區（如傑貝爾阿里自由區JAFZA）便於轉口貿易和存儲且無需繳納阿聯酋關稅，但不豁免產品在阿聯酋本地銷售的TRA型號認證要求。從自由區進入阿聯酋本地市場的產品與直接進口產品適用相同的TRA型號認證、標籤及授權進口商義務。未經授權進口或銷售未經認證的無線設備屬違反阿聯酋電信法律的違規行為。

standards_or_laws: UAE Federal Law No. 3 of 2003 on Telecommunications (Article on equipment import/sale)
TRA Type Approval Conditions — Authorized Importer and Dealer Requirements
TRA Label and Marking Requirements (TRA approval number and ITSEC mark on label)
UAE Free Zone Regulations (JAFZA — re-export does not waive local-sale TRA obligation)

summary.en: In China, the MIIT Network Access License (NAL) must be held by the manufacturer or its authorized representative. The CCC certificate holder (manufacturer or appointed agent) is responsible for placing the CCC mark on in-scope products. Distributors and importers do not require a separate licence, but must source from CCC-certified channels. Products sold in China bonded zones or pilot free trade zones for re-export are exempt from CCC, but any transition to domestic retail triggers full CCC obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，工信部网络接入许可（NAL）须由制造商或其授权代表持有。CCC证书持有人（制造商或指定代理人）负责在列入目录的产品上标注CCC标志。经销商和进口商无需单独取得许可证，但须从CCC认证渠道采购。在中国保税区或试点自由贸易区内为转口目的销售的产品可豁免CCC，但转入国内零售则须履行完整的CCC义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，工信部網路接入許可（NAL）須由製造商或其授權代表持有。CCC證書持有人（製造商或指定代理人）負責在列入目錄的產品上標注CCC標誌。經銷商和進口商無需單獨取得許可證，但須從CCC認證渠道採購。在中國保稅區或試點自由貿易區內為轉口目的銷售的產品可豁免CCC，但轉入國內零售則須履行完整的CCC義務。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Administration of Telecom Equipment Access
CCC Authorized Applicant and Certificate Holder Rules (CNCA)
China Pilot Free Trade Zone CCC Exemption Rules (for re-export only)

gap.en: UAE requires a locally TRA-registered authorized importer or dealer — this is a UAE-specific obligation with no direct CCC/NAL equivalent. Free zone entry for re-export does not waive TRA type approval for UAE domestic sale, unlike China's bonded zone CCC exemption scheme. The TRA approval number must appear on the physical label; a label change or re-stickering programme is typically needed for China-market products that carry SRRC/CCC numbers instead.
gap.zh: 阿联酋要求在TRA本地注册的授权进口商或经销商，这是阿联酋特有义务，无对应的CCC/NAL等效要求。进入自由区用于转口不豁免阿联酋本地销售的TRA型号认证，这与中国保税区CCC豁免方案不同。TRA审批号须显示于实体标签上；中国市场产品通常标注SRRC/CCC编号，一般需要更换或重贴标签。
gap.zht: 阿聯酋要求在TRA本地註冊的授權進口商或經銷商，這是阿聯酋特有義務，無對應的CCC/NAL等效要求。進入自由區用於轉口不豁免阿聯酋本地銷售的TRA型號認證，這與中國保稅區CCC豁免方案不同。TRA審批號須顯示於實體標籤上；中國市場產品通常標注SRRC/CCC編號，一般需要更換或重貼標籤。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority (UAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A TRA-registered authorized importer or dealer is mandatory for all wireless equipment sold in the UAE. TRA approval number and ITSEC mark must appear on device label and packaging. UAE Free Zone entry for re-export does not exempt the product from TRA type approval for local UAE sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿联酋销售的所有无线设备须有TRA注册授权进口商或经销商。TRA审批号和ITSEC标志须显示于设备标签及包装上。以转口为目的进入阿联酋自由区不豁免产品用于阿联酋本地销售时的TRA型号认证要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿聯酋銷售的所有無線設備須有TRA註冊授權進口商或經銷商。TRA審批號和ITSEC標誌須顯示於設備標籤及包裝上。以轉口為目的進入阿聯酋自由區不豁免產品用於阿聯酋本地銷售時的TRA型號認證要求。
